questionHtml:
Two cells each of emf 9.0 V and internal resistance 3.0 Ω are connected in series. A 12.0 Ω resistor is connected in series to the cells. What is the current in the resistor?

A. 0.50 A

B. 0.75 A

C. 1.0 A

D. 1.5 A

meta.title: Two cells each of emf 9.0 V and internal resistance 3.0 Ω are connected in series. A 12.0 Ω resistor is connected in series to the cells. What is the current in the resistor? A. 0.
